name: archive-of-life-artifact-world
description: Educational biodiversity exploration game — scalable data architecture prototype

scripts.pipeline:lint: cd data-pipeline && uv run ruff check .
scripts.pipeline:sql: cd data-pipeline && uv run archive-pipeline sql
scripts.pipeline:build-snapshot: cd data-pipeline && uv run archive-pipeline build-snapshot
scripts.pipeline:audit: cd data-pipeline && uv run archive-pipeline audit
scripts.pipeline:all: npm run pipeline:install && npm run pipeline:lint && npm run pipeline:test && npm run pipeline:sql && npm run pipeline:audit
